title: Ijuí Heavy Rain
lead: Ijuí is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.34. This anomaly has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Ijuí is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high Umidita of 95% and low Vento of 4.7 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD of 12.7 GG and CDD of 0.0 GG suggest a high demand for heating and minimal need for cooling.
conclusion: Operational teams should be on high alert to address the critical situation in Ijuí.
